function solve(landStartTime, landDuration, waterStartTime, waterDuration) {
    let minTime = Infinity;
    const n = landStartTime.length;
    const m = waterStartTime.length;
    for (let i = 0; i < n; i++) {
        for (let j = 0; j < m; j++) {
            // Scenario 1: Land first then water
            const landEnd = landStartTime[i] + landDuration[i];
            const waterStart = Math.max(landEnd, waterStartTime[j]);
            const waterEnd = waterStart + waterDuration[j];
            const scenario1 = waterEnd;
            
            // Scenario 2: Water first then land
            const waterEnd2 = waterStartTime[j] + waterDuration[j];
            const landStart = Math.max(waterEnd2, landStartTime[i]);
            const landEnd2 = landStart + landDuration[i];
            const scenario2 = landEnd2;
            
            const currentMin = Math.min(scenario1, scenario2);
            if (currentMin < minTime) {
                minTime = currentMin;
            }
        }
    }
    return minTime;
}
